components.name: Axidrol Alloy
components.description:
A compound formed from Axidite.

Blueprint sold by Smokefinger in Fortuna on Venus.

components.name: Devolved Namalon
components.description:
Retrieved from its Infested state, restored to worth and utility.

Blueprint sold by Otak in the Necralisk on Deimos.

components.name: Rubedo
components.description:
A jagged crystalline ore. Gives off radiant energy.

Location: Earth, Lua, Phobos, Europa, Pluto, Sedna, and the Void

components.name: Spectral Debris
components.description:
Discharged specter particles form an inert dust that can be collected and re-energized for various robotic projects.

Location: Errant Specters in the Granum Void (Corpus Ship Tileset)
